title: Tickeron’s AI Pattern Engine Delivers 80% Win Rate Across Intraday and Swing Trades
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
**SAN DIEGO** \- **Jan. 23, 2026** \- *PRLog* \-- **Key Takeaways**

* 80% historical win rate across intraday and daily pattern-based trades
* AI scans 39 technical chart patterns across stocks, ETFs, Forex, and crypto
* Strong performance in Aerospace & Defense stocks amid heightened market volatility
* Faster Financial Learning Models (FLMs) enable new 15-minute and 5-minute AI trading agents

**AI-Driven Pattern Recognition**  
  
Tickeron announced that its AI-powered **Pattern Search Engine (PSE)** has posted an **80% win rate** in simulated intraday and daily trades, reflecting the growing effectiveness of artificial intelligence in technical analysis. PSE leverages advanced **pattern recognition** to scan thousands of charts daily, identifying statistically validated trade opportunities with defined breakout and target prices.  
  
The system analyzes **39 distinct technical patterns**, helping traders capitalize on recurring market psychology rather than isolated news events.  
  
**Pattern Types Backed by Statistics**  
  
[Tickeron's AI](https://tickeron.com/app/ai-robots/signals/top-10/) continuously tracks both **bullish and bearish formations**, including widely followed structures such as **Cup-and-Handle, Flags, Pennants, Head-and-Shoulders Bottoms, Broadening Tops and Bottoms, Wedges, Channels, Rectangles, Triangles, Triple Bottoms, and Three Rising Valleys**.  
  
Each detected pattern is backtested, generating confidence levels, win/loss ratios, and projected price targets—allowing traders to filter opportunities by risk tolerance and timeframe.  
  
View Patterns: Screener for Stock Chart Patterns ᐉ Pattern Search Engine (PSE) ([https://tickeron.com/stock-pattern-screener/](https://tickeron.com/stock-pattern-screener/))  
  
**Aerospace & Defense Stocks in Focus**  
  
Recent market activity shows increased momentum in **Aerospace & Defense stocks**, driven by global security spending and shifting macroeconomic priorities. [Tickeron's Pattern Search Engine](https://tickeron.com/stock-pattern-screener/) has identified a higher-than-average frequency of **bullish continuation patterns** in this sector, making it a key area of interest for both swing and intraday traders.  
  
**Faster FLMs Power New 15- and 5-Minute AI Robots**  
  
[Tickeron](https://tickeron.com/) has expanded its computing infrastructure, enabling its **Financial Learning Models (FLMs)** to learn faster and react more quickly to changing market conditions. This upgrade supported the launch of **new 15-minute and 5-minute AI trading agents**, designed for high-liquidity environments and active traders.  
  
These [AI Robots](https://tickeron.com/app/ai-robots/signals/top-10/) automate decision-making while maintaining transparency, with performance metrics visible directly on **Tickeron.com**: [https://tickeron.com/app/ai-robots/virtualagents/all/](https://tickeron.com/app/ai-robots/virtualagents/all/)  
  
**Trading With AI, Simplified**  
  
For traders seeking automation, [Tickeron's ](https://tickeron.com/app/ai-robots/signals/top-10/)[**AI Robots**](https://tickeron.com/app/ai-robots/signals/top-10/) **(Swing Traders)** require minimal customization and generate fewer, higher-quality trades per day. Subscribing to AI Robots also provides monthly credits that can offset the cost of PSE, effectively granting access to advanced pattern analytics. More details are available at https://tickeron.com.  
  
**CEO Vision: AI Meets Technical Analysis**  
  
Sergey Savastiouk, Ph.D., CEO of Tickeron, emphasizes that combining AI with classical technical analysis is essential in volatile markets. Through FLMs, Tickeron helps traders recognize patterns more accurately, manage risk, and make data-driven decisions—bringing institutional-grade analytics to traders of all experience levels.

comments.author: Extreme-Beautiful257
comments.body:
I started using a small AI tool that analyzes structure and gives entry, stop loss, and targets automatically.  
It helped me avoid emotional trades and overtrading. [Aurexai.cloud](http://Aurexai.cloud)
